description.ko: 네온 빛의 궤적, 비에 젖은 크롬, 그리고 데이터의 무한한 흐름으로 정의되는 미래 메트로폴리스의 맥동하는 생명력입니다.
description.en: The pulsating life of a futuristic metropolis, defined by neon light trails, rain-slicked chrome, and the infinite flow of data.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Ultraviolet Arteries.' A sprawling cyberpunk megacity where #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. A torrential downpour creates ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and a melancholic urban atmosphere. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render.
